subcodes.first_line: O Ghulam! Upon thee be the glory of God, the Lord of all mankind! Praise thou the Desired One of the world and the Educator of nations, Who hath aided thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام علیک بهاء الله مالک الانام حمد کن مقصود عالم و مربی امم را ترا تایید فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
